meaning: n.抵工资的面包,实物工资制,汤米,英国兵
examples: He decided to pay a call on Tommy Cummings.
He watched Karl run across the street to Tommy.
Tommy marched out shaking his head.
"We're not talking about Tommy John or anything here, " Vogelsong said, his eyes misty.
"I spoke with Tommy, " Sullivan writes, referring to then-National Security Council spokesman Tommy Vietor.
